race.description: Book St Pat's Raceday 14 March Handicap
race.comment: Very good race with a host of last start winners. FURY (1) was having first run in this area for the new yard and recorded a big win, coming from last to score. Fitter for it and extra ground is a plus. Should be winding up strongly again. PATYEP (11) took 16 starts to break the maiden but did it in style last time, leading throughout for a big win. Posted a good figure and has a big weight drop in this. Off the low draw will be in this for a long way. JULY (8) returned from a break with an impressive win, coming home hard to arrive in time. Fitter again and looks tough to stop again. ROSSANADO (9) has been hard to fault this time in with two wins and a second from three starts. Will give a big sight again. KESSLER (2) was a big winner latest and drawn the inside. has to be included. Several others wouldn't shock in a wide-open race.
